title: WIP: Cirrus: Enable testing on Fedora Atomic Host 28

note to self: FAH + GCE: Networking-notworking :cry:

notes to self:
* Not networking problem: GCE metadata/startup-script problem.  It doesn't receive it? doesn't run?
* When run manually, it can't find `git` command to clone the repo. from
* Might need GCE login support...(in a container that starts by default?)

notes to self:
    * non-rpm install of google login api?
    * wrap 'git' with a scripted call into an SPC?

note to me: Needed rpms are: ``python-google-compute-engine google-compute-engine-oslogin google-compute-engine`` [according to docs.](https://cloud.google.com/compute/docs/instances/linux-guest-environment)
:umbrella: The latest upstream changes (presumably #1660) made this pull request unmergeable. Please resolve the merge conflicts.
Closing this down...was not able to reproduce problem :confounded:
going to re-tool this into smaller incremental chunks for easier review.
